rewritten_requirements: The system shall display journey details upon user login and destination selection.
The system shall allow users to activate driving mode or choose other options after viewing journey details.
The system shall enable users to select a place to eat, view its menu, and place an order if they are hungry.
The system shall inform relevant authorities in the event of an accident.
The system shall send notifications during driving or in case of an accident.
The system shall allow users to provide feedback upon completion of their journey.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system displays journey details after a user logs in and selects their destination.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'The system shows the journey details, and the user can check them again if needed.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can activate driving mode or select other options once they have viewed their journey details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'From there, the user can turn on driving mode or continue with other options.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can choose a place to eat and view its menu before placing an order if they feel hungry during the journey.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'If the user feels hungry, they can choose a place, view the menu, and place an order.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system informs relevant authorities in case of an accident.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'If an accident happens, the system informs the concerned authority and sends a notification.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system sends notifications during driving or in case of an accident.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'The system also sends notifications when needed, such as during driving or in case of an accident.'

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can provide feedback after completing their journey.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 'Once the journey is completed, the user can give feedback, and then it ends.'
